# HSRE Agriculture Pilot Protocol v1.0
Generated: 2026-02-11

## Objective
To measure and improve Human Structural Health in family-run farms and regional brand agriculture.

## Phase 1 – Initial Diagnosis (Day 0)
- 12-variable HSRE interview
- Health / Risk calculation
- 90-day improvement roadmap

## Phase 2 – 90-Day Implementation
- Knowledge documentation (K)
- Successor activation (S)
- Process standardization (P)
- Dependency reduction (D)

## Phase 3 – Re-measurement (Day 90)
- Recalculate HSRE
- Compare delta scores
- Produce sustainability trend report

## Target Sample Size
Minimum: 5 farms
Ideal: 20 farms (for statistical validation)
